title: Bare Bones - Lifesteal Hearts
description: A special life-steal texture on the hearts, based on Bare Bones Texturepack.
body:
# Bare Bones - Lifesteal Hearts
Bare Bones, Lifesteal Hearts is a texture pack with the aim of adapting the hearts in Minecraft to a dangerous appearance because with Lifesteal you lose a heart with every death, textures based on the Bare Bones texture pack.

### how to install
- Download Bare Bones Lifesteal.zip
- Go to %appdata%
- Copy .zip to /Roaming/.minecraft/resourcepaks
- Load Minecraft and select the Bare Bones Lifesteal Texture Pack

_You can also easily add the texture pack to a Fabric, Forge or other agency._

### By RNV
Renev Studios is a novice developer/designer.
